## Summary

Describe the change and business/technical motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests updated or added
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No sensitive data introduced
